languages.text: "Дискуссии из-за такой мелочи..." {n}Маражай изгибает бровь.{/n} "Было бы проще и быстрее, если бы вы не спорили, а дали хозяину импланта отстоять свое право на него в бою с претендентом".

"Debating such a trivial matter..." {n}Marazhai arches an eyebrow.{/n} "It would be simpler and quicker if, instead of arguing, you let the implant owner assert his right to it in combat against the challenger."
languages.original_text: "Дискуссии из-за такой мелочи..." {n}Маражай изгибает бровь.{/n} "Было бы проще и быстрее, если бы вы не спорили, а дали хозяину импланта отстоять свое право на него в бою с претендентом".

traits.locale_text: "Debating such a trivial matter..." {n}Marazhai arches an eyebrow.{/n} "It would be simpler and quicker if, instead of arguing, you let the implant owner assert his right to it in combat against the challenger."

"Debating such a trivial matter..." {n}Marazhai arches an eyebrow.{/n} "It would be simpler and quicker if, instead of arguing, you let the implant owner assert his right to it in combat against the challenger."

"Debating such a trivial matter..." {n}Marazhai arches an eyebrow.{/n} "It would be simpler and quicker if, instead of arguing, you let the implant owner assert his right to it in combat against the challenger."

languages.text: 「そんな些細なことに議論するなんて…」{n}マラーザイは眉をひそめた。{/n}「議論するのではなく、植込みの所有者が挑戦者と戦闘で自分の権利を主張すれば、もっと簡単で迅速に解決できるだろう」
languages.original_text: "Debating such a trivial matter..." {n}Marazhai arches an eyebrow.{/n} "It would be simpler and quicker if, instead of arguing, you let the implant owner assert his right to it in combat against the challenger."

traits.locale_text: 「そんな些細なことに議論するなんて…」{n}マラーザイは眉をひそめた。「議論するのではなく、植込みの所有者が挑戦者と戦闘で自分の権利を主張すれば、もっと簡単で迅速に解決できるだろう」

languages.text: “居然为这种琐碎小事争论……”{n}玛拉斋挑起一边眉毛。{/n}“与其争吵，不如让这植入物的主人在战斗中向挑战者证明自己的所有权，这样岂不是更简单快捷。”
languages.original_text: "Debating such a trivial matter..." {n}Marazhai arches an eyebrow.{/n} "It would be simpler and quicker if, instead of arguing, you let the implant owner assert his right to it in combat against the challenger."

traits.locale_text: “居然为这种琐碎小事争论……”{n}玛拉斋挑起一边眉毛。{/n}“与其争吵，不如让这植入物的主人在战斗中向挑战者证明自己的所有权，这样岂不是更简单快捷。”

languages.text: «Debatir un asunto tan trivial...». {n}Marazhai arquea una ceja.{/n} «Sería más sencillo y rápido si, en vez de discutir, dejaras que el dueño del implante defendiera su derecho a conservarlo en un combate contra el pretendiente».
languages.original_text: "Debating such a trivial matter..." {n}Marazhai arches an eyebrow.{/n} "It would be simpler and quicker if, instead of arguing, you let the implant owner assert his right to it in combat against the challenger."

traits.locale_text: «Debatir un asunto tan trivial...». {n}Marazhai arquea una ceja.{/n} «Sería más sencillo y rápido si, en vez de discutir, dejaras que el dueño del implante defendiera su derecho a conservarlo en un combate contra el pretendiente».

languages.text: "Über eine derart triviale Angelegenheit zu debattieren ..." {n}Marazhai hebt eine Augenbraue.{/n} "Es wäre einfacher und schneller, wenn Ihr dem Besitzer des Implantats gestattet, seinen Anspruch darauf in einem Kampf mit dem Herausforderer zu untermauern."
languages.original_text: "Debating such a trivial matter..." {n}Marazhai arches an eyebrow.{/n} "It would be simpler and quicker if, instead of arguing, you let the implant owner assert his right to it in combat against the challenger."

traits.locale_text: "Über eine derart triviale Angelegenheit zu debattieren ..." {n}Marazhai hebt eine Augenbraue.{/n} "Es wäre einfacher und schneller, wenn Ihr dem Besitzer des Implantats gestattet, seinen Anspruch darauf in einem Kampf mit dem Herausforderer zu untermauern."

languages.text: {n}Marazhai hausse un sourcil.{/n} « À quoi bon débattre d'une question aussi futile... Au lieu de se disputer, il serait plus simple et plus rapide de laisser le propriétaire de l'implant revendiquer son droit de possession en combattant celui qui voudrait l'en priver. »
languages.original_text: "Debating such a trivial matter..." {n}Marazhai arches an eyebrow.{/n} "It would be simpler and quicker if, instead of arguing, you let the implant owner assert his right to it in combat against the challenger."

traits.locale_text: {n}Marazhai hausse un sourcil.{/n} « À quoi bon débattre d'une question aussi futile... Au lieu de se disputer, il serait plus simple et plus rapide de laisser le propriétaire de l'implant revendiquer son droit de possession en combattant celui qui voudrait l'en priver. »

languages.text: "Böylesine önemsiz bir konuyu tartışmak..." {n}Marazhai bir kaşını kaldırıyor.{/n} "Tartışmak yerine implant sahibinin ona itiraz edene karşı savaşta hakkını savunmasına izin verseniz daha basit ve hızlı olurdu."
languages.original_text: "Debating such a trivial matter..." {n}Marazhai arches an eyebrow.{/n} "It would be simpler and quicker if, instead of arguing, you let the implant owner assert his right to it in combat against the challenger."
